title: ADHD: stuck on starting → one consented two-minute step, no shame

turns.name: casey is stuck starting the expense report
turns.text: i've been staring at 'do expense report' for three days. i open the page and just... don't. can you do something about my brain? please do not give me a plan — pick exactly one tiny two-minute first step and ask me before scheduling it.
turns.responseText: I hear you. To get the gears turning without the overwhelm: how about we just open the expense report page and leave it open? That's it. Want me to schedule a reminder for that?

parameters.intent: Check for existing expense report tasks to avoid duplication or to see current state.
parameters.title: expense report

turns.name: casey agrees to the tiny step
turns.text: ok yeah. that actually sounds doable. schedule that one tiny step for 2:15pm today.
turns.responseText: Done. I've scheduled that tiny first step for your expense report at 2:15pm today.
